testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank should initialize with correct defaults
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank should initialize with correct defaults

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank should not drop health below 0
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank should not drop health below 0

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank should reduce health by damage amount
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank should reduce health by damage amount

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isBigShotReady returns false when consecutiveHits < 3
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isBigShotReady returns false when consecutiveHits < 3

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isBigShotReady returns true when consecutiveHits >= 3
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isBigShotReady returns true when consecutiveHits >= 3

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isHit detects a point inside the tank bounding box
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isHit detects a point inside the tank bounding box

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isHit rejects a point outside the tank bounding box
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Tank isHit rejects a point outside the tank bounding box

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) should apply maximum damage on a direct hit
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) should apply maximum damage on a direct hit

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) should apply no damage if explosion is too far
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) should apply no damage if explosion is too far

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) should apply partial damage within the blast radius
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) should apply partial damage within the blast radius

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) Big Shot applies more maximum damage than normal shot
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic applyDamage (distance-based) Big Shot applies more maximum damage than normal shot

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic GAME_STATE enum has all required states
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic GAME_STATE enum has all required states

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic CONFIG CELL_SIZE is a positive number
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic CONFIG CELL_SIZE is a positive number

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic CONFIG MAX_SHOTS is a positive integer
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic CONFIG MAX_SHOTS is a positive integer

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic CONFIG PROJECTILE_SPEED_SCALE is between 0 and 1
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic CONFIG PROJECTILE_SPEED_SCALE is between 0 and 1

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Combo System consecutiveHits increments correctly
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Combo System consecutiveHits increments correctly

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Combo System consecutiveHits resets to 0 properly
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Combo System consecutiveHits resets to 0 properly

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Input Constraints power is constrained between 0 and 100
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Input Constraints power is constrained between 0 and 100

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Input Constraints angle is constrained between -180 and 0
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Input Constraints angle is constrained between -180 and 0

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Shot Tracking tank starts with MAX_SHOTS
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Shot Tracking tank starts with MAX_SHOTS

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Shot Tracking shotsLeft decreases when firing
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Shot Tracking shotsLeft decreases when firing

testcase.classname: Artillery Duel Game Logic Shot Tracking cannot fire when out of ammo (shotsLeft === 0)
testcase.name: Artillery Duel Game Logic Shot Tracking cannot fire when out of ammo (shotsLeft === 0)
